div1.entryFree: Peal, a mighty sound: the p. begins (i. e. Armado's speech) LLL V, 1, 46. whether those --s of praise be his, Merch. III, 2, 146. ring a hunter's p. Tit. II, 2, 5. Tit. II, 2, 5 ere to black Hecate's summons the shard-borne beetle with his drowsy hums hath rung night's yawning p. Mcb. III, 2, 43 (like a bell).
